title: George Municipality’s landlines and internet connections down at few satellite offices
bodyText:
UPDATE: George Municipality’s landlines and internet connections restored

GEORGE NEWS - George Municipality is experiencing technical problems with landlines and internet connections at their Environmental offices, 82 Meade Street and at Human Settlement and Community Development offices on the corner of St. John’s van Varing Streets.


> Please contact George Municipality switchboard at 044 801 9111.


George Municipality will inform the public of any further developments.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
